market_snapshot.as_of: 2026-07-22 EVENING run (18:27 IST). NIFTY closed 23996.25 (-191.45/-0.79%), third straight down day, below 24000; Sensex -715 (-0.92%). India VIX 13.29 (+5.49%). Broader market underperformed: midcap -1.05%, smallcap -1.39%.
